name: Anna Lou's Broccoli Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces canned mushroom soup or equivalent white sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli in boiling salted water until just tender.
2. In a saucepan, combine the tuna, mushroom soup (or white sauce), milk, and 1/2 cup grated cheese. Heat until almost boiling.
3. Place a layer of cooked broccoli in a shallow greased casserole dish.
4. Cover with a layer of the tuna mixture.
5. Repeat layers of broccoli and tuna mixture.
6. Sprinkle with 1/3 cup grated cheese.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until bubbly and golden brown.
